title: Kit: Custom
description: Ever wanted to be able to load and save your custom pvp kits? like those servers or plugins?
body:
# Description:
Kit Custom or Custom Kits is a datapack made for people who would like to be able to save kits for pvp like those plugins or servers.

## How do we use it?
To use it, its quite simple. your first gonna need to save your kit with this command:
```
/function kit_custom:cmd/save/<1-3>
```
and then your gonna be promoted to a menu, click the "Are you sure?" button if you do wanna save your kit and after this your going to be asked again a yes or no question, you can say "yes" if you want to save your kit.

if you dont or wanna cancel just press the escape key.

### Others:
If you would like to quickly save the kits yoi can just do this command:
```
/function kit_custom:technical/save_yes/<1-3>
```

## Loading.
Now that you have saved your kit, you must be asking, how fo i get it. well just use rhis command:
```
/function kit_custom:cmd/load/<1-3>
```


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
